productDisplayName: Hanes Women Beige Concealing Petals Underwire Moulded Bra
description: Style NoteFinally a brassiere that knows just what you need - light padding with the luxury of seamless comfort. This hanes brassiere promises "no show" which means, no more visible lines under that slinky satin party top or your favourite statement tee. Product DetailsNude beige coloured brassiere with full cupsBuilt-in ultra thin padded, under-wired, seamless cupsAdjustable shoulder strapsStretchy side wings with double hook and eye closure adjustable up to three notchesConcealing petals inside the cup to prevent it from showing throughMaterial and Care82% nylon and 18% spandexMachine wash warm with like coloursTumble dry low Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
